pages.title: Sea Elf
pages.text: Stacks on the shared $(l:races/elf)Elf$(/l) base. Amphibious — full function on land, comfortable in water. Not water-dominant like $(l:races/locathah)Locathah$(/l).

pages.title: Traits
pages.text: $(bold)Sea Lungs.$(/) Hold breath underwater for roughly 45 seconds. Not infinite.$(br2)$(bold)Tidewalker.$(/) Swim speed +40%.$(br2)$(bold)Sea-Kin.$(/) Drowned and guardians treat you as one of theirs and ignore you.$(br2)No extra drawback.
